contains.description: Check if output contains a substring

equals.description: Check if output equals expected value

is_json.description: Check if output is valid JSON

regex_match.description: Check if output matches a regular expression

bleu.description: Calculate BLEU score for text generation

anls.description: Calculate ANLS score for structured data comparison

factual_accuracy.description: Evaluate factual accuracy using LLM judge

answer_correctness.description: Evaluate answer correctness using LLM judge

bias.description: Evaluate potential biases using LLM judge

safety.description: Evaluate content safety using LLM judge

instruction_following.description: Evaluate how well output follows explicit instructions
